author: y4rr
content: Phase 8 PROBE-BEFORE-FIX, DeepLabV3 Movement 2: STOP-AND-REPORT signal. torchvision deeplabv3_resnet50 has structural (not pure naming) divergence from ferrotorch DeepLabV3: (1) ASPP atrous_rates=(12,24,36) torchvision default vs ferrotorch hardcoded (6,12,18); (2) DeepLabHead is Sequential[ASPP, Conv3x3(256,256,bias=False), BN256, ReLU, Conv1x1(256,N,bias=True)] — ferrotorch's DeepLabV3Head is just aspp + 1x1 classifier (missing 3x3 conv + BN intermediate); (3) final classifier bias=True in torchvision but bias=False in ferrotorch; (4) ASPPPooling submodule indexing places conv at convs.4.1 (after avgpool=4.0) and BN at 4.2 — ferrotorch ASPPPooling exposes (conv, bn) at indices that don't match. Pure naming remap insufficient; src/ changes to atrous rates + DeepLabHead structure are required. Filing as separate issue, redirect Movement 2 to scope-narrow.
